name: Template-Based File Generation

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Template-Based File Generation is complete and correct

scope:
Template-based file generation per spec .wolfcastle/docs/specs/2026-03-22T09-00Z-template-file-generation.md

Move all generated file content (scaffold, ADRs, specs, task markdown) from Go string literals into template files under internal/project/templates/. Extend the existing PromptRepository/tierfs infrastructure to support a templates/ prefix alongside prompts/ -- do NOT create a parallel system. Add a shared RenderToFile convenience method. Replace all strings.Builder / fmt.Sprintf / os.WriteFile chains at each call site with RenderToFile. Verify with snapshot tests: output must be byte-for-byte identical before and after. After implementation, document the template override mechanism in docs/humans/configuration.md and update relevant CLI docs and CONTRIBUTING.md.
